---
title: "Services Offered"
format: html
  
---

Origami Data Science Services offers three types of data science services: consulting, programming and data analysis.

#### 1. Consulting

Every effective summary of a data-driven process begins with the proper measurement and recording of data. Origami Data Science Services provides consulting by guiding clients through the full data pipeline — from data recording to preprocessing, data analytics, and statistical summarization. This includes developing tailored concepts for each stage, recommending appropriate statistical and analytical tools, and establishing methods to assess and quantify the reliability of results.

#### 2. Programming

Origami Data Science Services offers statistical programming using {{< iconify simple-icons r >}} and its extensive ecosystem of libraries (such as those within the tidyverse), covering data wrangling, data visualization, and the exploration of hidden structures in data. Selected examples of smaller projects can be found on the blog, an example of an {{< iconify simple-icons r >}} package is the FibFreq project (see [{{< iconify simple-icons:github >}} GitHub](https://github.com/origami-dss)), and manyof my  publications are based on data analyses carried out with R (see [{{< iconify fa6-solid:link >}} Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=GrbsqM0AAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate)).

#### 3. Data Analysis

Origami Data Science Services offers comprehensive data analysis, including preprocessing, model fitting, and model validation. Results are delivered through clear and concise reports, featuring statistical summaries presented in text, tables, and visualizations.


::: {style="border: 1px solid rgb(210, 47, 60); padding: 10px; border-radius: 1px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; background-color: rgba(210, 47, 60, 0.3);"}
If you are interested in booking me, please contact me per email for an video appointment.
{{< iconify lucide mail >}} Email: annette.witt@posteo.de
:::
